name: vendor.myndhyve.wop-refinement
description: MyndHyve WOP feature-refinement node — wop.feature.refine. Driven by a `feature.breakdown` LLM envelope; decides whether a stack item is actionable as a node, executable as a chain, must be split into sub-items, needs clarification, or should be blocked. Enforces hard `maxDepth` + `maxGeneratedItems` constraints regardless of LLM proposal. Used by both runner-driven dispatch (StackAutoplayRunner) and chain-driven sub-workflows.
author: MyndHyve
